en.value:
A) RURAL YOUTH DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM (RYDP)

	
		Cooperative Strengthening and Income Generation :
		
			
				 Cooperative Educaitonal Camps – 12 events
			
				 Cooperative Policy Preparation Workshop – 12 events
			
				 Linkage and Network with DSCCU – 6 times
			
				 Network and Linkage with Central Bank – 6 times
			
				 Logistic and stationery support for cooperative -16
			
				 Account keeping refresher training for cooperatives – 4 times
			
				 Orientation on Management Information sustem in cooperative – 12 times
			
				  Cooperative Networks meeting- 6 times
			
				   Farm based LRP training – 6 persons
			
				Improved livestock rearing training and inputs – 6 times
			
				Organic vegetable farming training and inputs – 10 events
			
				Organic ginger, herbs and fruits farming training and inputs – 10 events
			
				Off-farm skill development training for youths – 58 youths
			
				Exposure visit for LEISA techniques (organic farming) – 1 time
			
				Agriculture market promotion – 7 events
			
				Training for PEARLS and Self-monitoring – need based
			
				Network and Linkage with RMDI – 4 times
			
				Network a nd Linkage (NEFSCUN) and RMDI – 6 cooperatives
			
				Computer Accounting Software – 6 cooperatives
			
				Computerized Account keeping training – 6 cooperatives
			
				Entrepreneurship Development Training – 3 events
			
				Organic Farming Training – 3 enents
			
				ToT for Organic farming – 2 events
			
				Internal Control System Training  for Organic farming – 2 events
			
				Organic Farming Training (by LRP or ToT participants) – 3 events
			
				Organic Farming Certification fee – 4 times
			
				Organic Farming Materials support – 2 times
		
	
	
		Youth Information Center Strengthing and Safe Migration 
		
			
				Orientation to youths on safe migration – 24 events
			
				Street Drama on raising awareness on foreign employment – 4 events
			
				IEC materials developed for migration – 2 items
			
				Youth voice publication – 5 times
			
				YIC long term plan development workshop – 10 events
			
				Support on YIC long term plans – 10 times
			
				Capacity building YIC member on safe migration and counseling – 3 times
			
				YIC management support – 24 times
			
				Networking YIC at National level – 12 events
			
				ToT youth advocacy training – 6 times
		
	
	
		LNGO Strengthening and Youth Development 
		
			
				ToT on Advocacy for LNGOs management – 3 times
			
				 Support for LNGO for VDC/DDC council meetings – 16 times
			
				Support for LNGOs affiliation with NGO Federation and SWC – 6 times
			
				LNGOs long term plan development workshop – 6 events
			
				LNGOs management support – 24 times
			
				PTS interaction – 23 events
			
				 Youth Scholarship – 49 youths
			
				Self help initiatives – 20 initiatives
			
				Youth informal classess – 10 classes
			
				LNGOs long term plan reviw workshop – 6 events
		
	
	
		Material support to Local Structures (non AWO partners)
		
			
				Furniture/computer support cooperatives – 12 sets
			
				Furniture supports for YICs – 8 sets
			
				Furniture supports for LNGOs – 3 sets
		
	
	
		Project Coordination 
		
			
				Project Inception for Third Phase – 2 evetns
			
				Project Managemnt Committee meeting – 5 times
			
				Social Audits at VDC level- 18 events
			
				DPAC and Social Audit at District level – 3 times
			
				Monitoring by project staffs – 12 times
			
				Half yearly monitoring by project and organization – 6 times
			
				Learning sharing program – 1 time
			
				Endline survey – 1 time.
		
	


	B) Community Empowerment & Sustainable Livelihood Program (CE&SLP)

	
		ToT on CAP (Community Action Plan) TOT for Social Mobilizers (SM), Local Resource Persons (LRP), REFLECT Facilitators – 1 time
	
		Development of CAP (Community Action Plans) and technical backstopping for groups/Coops/LNGO – 7 events
	
		Advocacy skill development trainings for representatives of, Local Structures., SM, REFLECT facilitators- 1 events
	
		Exposure visit for group/coops. members – 1 events
	
		Interaction between RH and service providers (district and VDC level both) – 5 events
	
		Production and broadcasting of Radio programs on the topics of rights and awareness – 18 episodes
	
		Commemorate various Marking Days – national and international – 10 events/days (theme wise)
	
		Training on Good Governance for Institutional Development to Coops. Members – 1 event
	
		Facilitation support for regular participation of Coops./LNGO in VDC/DDC council meetings and other such local forums – 20 events
	
		Support for Coops. affiliation with Coop. federation and other local networks – 5 events
	
		Support to Coops./LNGO for school enrollment campaign (in 15 CLC Centers) – 15 events
	
		Basic Training for REFLECT Facilitators and Social Mobilzers – 1 tim
